name: centaur-technical-indicators
description: WASM bindings for Centaur Technical Indicators for Node and browser
author: ChironMind

scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir dist/web --out-name centaur-technical-indicators && rm -f dist/web/.gitignore
scripts.build:node: wasm-pack build --release --target nodejs --out-dir dist/node --out-name centaur-technical-indicators && rm -f dist/node/.gitignore
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build --release --target bundler --out-dir dist/bundler --out-name centaur-technical-indicators && rm -f dist/bundler/.gitignore
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:node && npm run build:bundler
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:only
